prompt: I added the request_id middleware to internal/middleware/request_id.go. It generates a unique X-Request-ID for each incoming request and propagates it to downstream services. The config key is 'request_id' under middleware in config.yaml. Can you update the middleware table in docs_wiki/REFERENCE.md to include the new middleware? The table lists middleware with columns: Name, Config Key, Purpose. Also check if docs_wiki/README.md needs any updates — the Middleware doc table might list the middleware entries.

assertions.text: Adds request_id row to the middleware table in REFERENCE.md
assertions.name: adds-to-reference-table

assertions.text: Uses the correct three-column format matching existing entries (Name, Config Key, Purpose)
assertions.name: correct-table-format

assertions.text: The new entry is placed in a consistent position (alphabetical or end of table)
assertions.name: consistent-ordering

assertions.text: Does not modify any other part of REFERENCE.md beyond the middleware table
assertions.name: no-unnecessary-changes

assertions.text: Updates README.md if the middleware table there is also affected, or explains why no update is needed
assertions.name: handles-readme
